title: CodexEvaluation
description: Canonical output schema for /codex-evaluate — structured code-quality assessment produced by Codex CLI via --output-schema. Single source of truth; all references in commands/codex-evaluate.md and skills/schema-builder/SKILL.md should defer to this file.

issues.description: List of code issues discovered during evaluation. May be empty if no issues are found.

items.description: A single code issue identified by the evaluator.

severity.description: Impact level: low = style/cosmetic, medium = correctness risk, high = likely bug, critical = security/data-loss.

file.description: Relative file path (from project root) where the issue was found. Omit if not file-specific.

line.description: 1-based line number of the issue within the file. Omit if not line-specific.

suggestion.description: Recommended fix or improvement for this issue.

confidence.description: Model confidence in the correctness of this evaluation result (0.0 = no confidence, 1.0 = fully confident).

summary.description: Short narrative summary (2–5 sentences) of the overall evaluation findings.

strengths.description: Positive aspects of the code identified during evaluation. May be empty.

overall_quality.description: Coarse overall quality rating derived from the issues found and code strengths.
